notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: launch window and pricing patience. Primary keyword: Hermosa Beach housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Hermosa Beach housing market; Hermosa Beach real estate market update; Hermosa Beach home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Hermosa Beach; Hermosa Beach home selling market; Hermosa Beach homes for sale inventory; Hermosa Beach days on market; Hermosa Beach listing price; Hermosa Beach seller market; Hermosa Beach housing market 2026; Hermosa Beach market update sellers; Hermosa Beach median home price; are home prices dropping in Hermosa Beach; is now a good time to sell in Hermosa Beach. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
